svg.title: RAG Healthcare Assistant – Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture showing ingestion pipeline, vector store, agentic layer, and response generation for a healthcare RAG assistant

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What medical data sources should I include in the RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How do I parse clinical guidelines PDFs for RAG?')
sendPrompt('What is FHIR and how can I use it in a healthcare RAG project?')
sendPrompt('What drug databases should I use for a healthcare assistant?')
sendPrompt('How do I use medical ontologies like SNOMED and ICD-10 in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What chunking strategies work best for medical text in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does medical NER work and what models should I use?')
sendPrompt('What are the best embedding models for medical text?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure metadata for medical document chunks?')
sendPrompt('What vector databases should I use for a healthcare RAG project?')
sendPrompt('How does hybrid search work in RAG and why is it better for medical queries?')
sendPrompt('What is a knowledge graph and how do I add one to a healthcare RAG system?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a query understanding and intent detection module for a healthcare chatbot?')
sendPrompt('What are ReAct agents and how do I implement one for a healthcare RAG assistant?')
sendPrompt('What tools should I give a healthcare AI agent?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement memory and conversation history in a healthcare chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement safety guardrails for a healthcare AI assistant?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure prompts for a medical RAG system with citations?')
sendPrompt('How do I evaluate hallucination in a medical RAG system?')
sendPrompt('What should the UI for a healthcare RAG assistant look like?')
sendPrompt('What evaluation metrics should I use for a healthcare RAG system?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a Streamlit or FastAPI frontend for a healthcare RAG app?')
sendPrompt('How do I add LLM observability and tracing to a RAG pipeline?')
g.text: LangSmith / Arize / Phoenix — latency, token cost, retrieval quality per query
